reference: What is the meaning of microfibroids of average size twenty-two x eighteen millimeters, irregular endometrial plates, no pouch of Douglas, no ovarian cyst? The pouch of Douglas is empty.
text: What is the meaning of microfibroids of average size 22.8 mm? Irregular endometrial weights. No pouch of Douglas. No ovarian cysts. The pouch of Douglas is empty.
